name: Hustronix Post Workflow
description: Slack: select → carousel → publish to LinkedIn. Repo: hustronix35-prog/hustronix-content-ops

prompts.text:
Route Slack commands:

1. Run: python scripts/setup_carousel_env.py (skip if validate_carousel_setup.py passes)
2. Run: python scripts/slack_post_workflow.py "{message}"

Commands: select 1|2|3 · carousel · publish

Premium v2 carousels require Playwright Chromium (setup script installs it).
Brand assets must exist in assets/brand/ on master.

Secrets: LINKEDIN_* (publish), SLACK_BOT_TOKEN + SLACK_CHANNEL_ID (carousel upload)

Repo: hustronix35-prog/hustronix-content-ops branch master
